name: investigator
summary: LLM-driven runner that investigates and fills an incident (evidence-based root cause + the five steps). The first agent. Dispatched by /incident; runs to exit = isComplete.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT admitted, NOT in the harness file. When admitted, code moves to harness/runners/investigator/.

input.description: A trigger plus the scaffolded incident file to fill.

schema.trigger: string (the /incident invocation; later a classified escalation signal)

output.description: The one incident file, filled with evidence-based content.

execution: off the main channel — background worker; caller returns immediately, notified on completion; never inline/synchronous
flow: self-contained: fill → self-verify (incident.mjs check) → append its log-index line in README.md → report one line
invariants: Writes within record/incidents/ ONLY — its incident file (one per run) + its appended log-index line. Nothing else.
Never fabricates a root cause; unconfirmed ⇒ status: open.
Doing != deciding — it investigates/proposes, it does not fix or merge.
Independent of the cause — must not soften an incident its own session caused.
Runs to the exit (isComplete) and stops; reports a one-line result so completion doesn't bounce chores to the main channel.
